name: the stolen item
identity: An object of personal significance to the player character, representing a connection to the world beyond the tribe. Its theft and subsequent presence in the narrative serve as a reminder of the player's past and motivations.
current_status: Symbolically present as a lingering tie to the player's past, influencing their contemplation of using arcane powers to strengthen the tribe. Not physically carried in this scene but referenced as a motivator for their vision of the future.

volatile_state.current_activity: being pursued by the player, whose memory of its name is unclear

notes: The name of the item is not explicitly stated, only implied to be a blur in the player's memory.
